block_00: Support and Resistance: Trading Basics Tutorial
block_01: Support and resistance are levels on the chart that the price has a chance of retracing from. By using them you can find promising entry points. However, to fully utilize it, you will need to learn some things about this strategy first.
block_02: In this piece you will find basic information on how to effectively use support and resistance strategy in your trading.
block_04: Bolly Band Bounce — a Trading Strategy with Only 1 Indicator
block_05: Usually flat market periods mean a sharp drop in trading since most people wait for the trade to emerge again. However, it is actually possible, if tricky, to trade in a flat market, by using a Bolly Band strategy.  Read more about it in this article.
block_07: How to Trade with Parabolic SAR in the Most Effective Way
block_08: SAR stands for “stop and reverse”, and has been around since 1978. It is no wonder that the indicator that stood the test of time will be popular. If you want to use it in your trading or want to check if it has more to offer, read this piece to learn more.
